GET /twitter/tweet/replies/v2.desc_en: Fetch the replies to a given tweet, returned one page at a time and ordered by relevance, recency, or like count. Read-only; use the returned cursor to walk through subsequent pages.
GET /twitter/tweet/replies/v2.description_zh: 拉取某条推文下的回复,分页返回,可按相关性、时间或点赞数排序。只读接口,借响应中返回的游标逐页向后翻。
GET /twitter/tweet/replies/v2.resp_section_intro: 成功时返回本页回复列表、翻页游标与请求状态。
GET /twitter/tweet/replies/v2.errors_source: spec 仅声明 200,无错误码定义

tweetId.desc_en: Identifier of the tweet whose replies you want to retrieve. It is the numeric ID found in the tweet's URL.
tweetId.title_zh: 要获取回复的目标推文标识,即推文 URL 中的那串数字 ID。

cursor.desc_en: Pagination token pointing at the next batch of replies. Take it from the `next_cursor` of a previous response; leave it unset to start from the first page.
cursor.title_zh: 指向下一批回复的翻页令牌。取自上一次响应的 `next_cursor`;首次请求留空即从第一页开始。

queryType.desc_en: Ordering applied to the returned replies: `Relevance` surfaces the replies the platform deems most relevant, `Latest` orders by most recent first, and `Likes` orders by most-liked first.
queryType.title_zh: 返回回复的排序方式:`Relevance` 优先展示平台判定最相关的回复,`Latest` 按时间从新到旧,`Likes` 按点赞数从高到低。

replies.desc_en: The replies on this page, each a full tweet object.
replies.title_zh: 本页的回复,每个元素是一条完整的推文对象。

replies.type.desc_en: Object kind of the record, distinguishing a tweet from other entities the API may return.
replies.type.title_zh: 记录的对象类型,用于区分推文与接口可能返回的其他实体。

replies.id.desc_en: The reply tweet's unique identifier; use it to fetch this reply's own replies or to build its URL.
replies.id.title_zh: 该回复推文的唯一标识;可用于获取这条回复下的下级回复,或拼接其 URL。

replies.url.desc_en: Direct, clickable link to the reply tweet.
replies.url.title_zh: 该回复推文的可直接点击链接。

replies.text.desc_en: Full body text of the reply.

replies.source.desc_en: The client application from which the reply was posted, such as a web or mobile app.
replies.source.title_zh: 发布该回复所用的客户端应用,例如网页端或移动端 App。

replies.retweetCount.desc_en: Number of times the reply has been retweeted.

replies.replyCount.desc_en: Number of replies this reply itself has received.
replies.replyCount.title_zh: 该回复自身收到的回复数。

replies.likeCount.desc_en: Number of likes the reply has received.

replies.quoteCount.desc_en: Number of times the reply has been quote-tweeted.
replies.quoteCount.title_zh: 该回复被引用转推的次数。

replies.viewCount.desc_en: Number of times the reply has been viewed.

replies.createdAt.desc_en: Timestamp of when the reply was posted.

replies.lang.desc_en: Detected language of the reply text, as a language code.
replies.lang.title_zh: 回复文本经识别得到的语言,以语言代码表示。

replies.bookmarkCount.desc_en: Number of times the reply has been bookmarked.
replies.bookmarkCount.title_zh: 该回复被加入书签的次数。

replies.isReply.desc_en: Whether this tweet is itself a reply to another tweet.
replies.isReply.title_zh: 该推文本身是否为对另一条推文的回复。

replies.inReplyToId.desc_en: Identifier of the tweet this reply is responding to.
replies.inReplyToId.title_zh: 该回复所回应的那条推文的标识。

replies.conversationId.desc_en: Identifier of the conversation thread the reply belongs to; typically the ID of the original tweet that started the thread.
replies.conversationId.title_zh: 该回复所属对话串的标识,通常为开启该对话的原始推文 ID。

replies.inReplyToUserId.desc_en: Identifier of the user being replied to.

replies.inReplyToUsername.desc_en: Handle of the user being replied to.

replies.isLimitedReply.desc_en: Whether replying to this tweet is restricted by the author's reply settings.
replies.isLimitedReply.title_zh: 该推文是否因作者的回复设置而受限,无法自由回复。

has_next_page.desc_en: Whether more replies remain beyond the current page.
has_next_page.title_zh: 当前页之后是否还有更多回复。

next_cursor.desc_en: Token to pass back as `cursor` to retrieve the next page of replies.
next_cursor.title_zh: 用于取回下一页回复的令牌,回传给 `cursor` 参数即可。

status.desc_en: Outcome of the request: `success` for a normal result, `error` when the request failed.
status.title_zh: 请求结果:`success` 表示正常返回,`error` 表示请求失败。

message.desc_en: Human-readable error detail, populated only when the request failed.
message.title_zh: 可读的错误说明,仅在请求失败时才有内容。
